3#include "common/unicode_norm.h"

5/*
6 * Normalization quick check entry for codepoint.  We use a bit field
7 * here to save space.
8 */
9typedef struct
10{
11	unsigned int codepoint:21;
12	signed int	quickcheck:4;	/* really UnicodeNormalizationQC */
13} pg_unicode_normprops;
14
15/* Typedef for hash function on quick check table */
16typedef int (*qc_hash_func) (const void *key);
17
18/* Information for quick check lookup with perfect hash function */
19typedef struct
20{
21	const pg_unicode_normprops *normprops;
22	qc_hash_func	hash;
23	int		num_normprops;
24} pg_unicode_norminfo;

1601
1602	const unsigned char *k = (const unsigned char *) key;
1603	size_t		keylen = 4;
1604	uint32		a = 0;
1605	uint32		b = 0;
1606
1607	while (keylen--)
1608	{
1609		unsigned char c = *k++;
1610
1611		a = a * 257 + c;
1612		b = b * 8191 + c;
1613	}
1614	return h[a % 2505] + h[b % 2505];
1615}

8004
8005	const unsigned char *k = (const unsigned char *) key;
8006	size_t		keylen = 4;
8007	uint32		a = 0;
8008	uint32		b = 3;
8009
8010	while (keylen--)
8011	{
8012		unsigned char c = *k++;
8013
8014		a = a * 257 + c;
8015		b = b * 8191 + c;
8016	}
8017	return h[a % 10193] + h[b % 10193];
8018}
